Run the following CI checks and report results: 1. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ packages/` 2. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/ packages/` 3. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ty check src/ packages/` 4. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/artifacts/test_sync.py tests/unit/fakes/test_fake_skills_cli.py tests/artifacts/test_orphan_cleanup.py -x -q`

session.assistant:
## CI Check Results
### 1. Ruff Linting Check - FAILED
**Found 1 error:**
- `tests/artifacts/test_sync.py:3:1` - Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted (I001) - Lines 3-30: Import statements need reorganization - Fixable with `--fix` option
### 2. Ruff Format Check - FAILED
**1 file would be reformatted:**
- `src/erk/cli/commands/init/main.py` - Needs formatting - 1,665 files already formatted correctly
### 3. Type Checking (ty) - PASSED
All checks passed!
### 4. Pytest - PASSED
All 48 tests passed in the specified test files: - `tests/artifacts/test_sync.py` - `tests/unit/fakes/test_fake_skills_cli.py` - `tests/artifacts/test_orphan_cleanup.py`
**Summary:** - 2 checks failed (ruff linting and formatting) - 2 checks passed (type checking and pytest)
The failures are formatting-related: 1. Import sorting issue in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/artifacts/test_sync.py` 2. Code formatting needed in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/init/main.py`
